full_text:
Empress Lü [Lü Zhi] 呂后[呂雉]
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Empress Lü [Lü Zhi] (呂后[呂雉]). Wife of Liu Bang, founder of the Han Dynasty. She played an active in governance. Empress Lü [Lü Zhi] was an historic figure affiliated with the Former Han Dynasty. Empress Lü [Lü Zhi] lived during the Former Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
